query:
SELECT 
  status,
  billingPeriod,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(monthlyCost) AS totalCost
FROM services
WHERE status = 'terminated' OR terminationStatus IS NOT NULL OR terminationStatus != ''
GROUP BY status, billingPeriod
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
